jobDescription: We are notonthehighstreet. Home to over 5000 of the UK’s best small creative businesses, we have been changing the online retail landscape since 2006. Whether you’re working with our Partners to help grow their business, or behind the scenes developing code, we are continuously innovating & working on some really cool stuff all at the same time. And the best bit? We’re making a difference to our Partners’ lives as we do it. Are you looking for a role that will allow you to use your SEO skills as well as work collaboratively across various areas of the business? Are you ready for the next step in your career where your role will be focused on strategy whilst still take full ownership of delivery? Then this role will be the perfect fit for you! As our SEO Manager, you will help deliver the on-site and off-site SEO strategy. You will be reporting directly to the Head of Growth and be part of the Customer and Growth team.  Some of the things you’ll be doing... Drive SEO performance improvements and manage projects across departments to support your strategy in agreement with the Head of Growth Audit the site and identify strategic opportunities and prioritizing them against other tactical actions to achieve a balance of short to long term performance Manage and execute the SEO plan as well as manage external SEO agency and vendors Work with tech, product, content and merchandising to deliver the SEO plan Run, manage and analyse effectiveness of SEO tests using best practice methods Deliver performance review and details on impact and effectiveness of the strategy Who will you be working with? Tech/ Product Departments – drive forward technical SEO advancements Third Party agency/freelancer – relationship management to ensure a good return on investment from all agency activity Content, Merchandising and PR – helping to optimize overall search activity and develop content marketing development plans Some Key Skills + Experience You'll Need Strong track-record of in-house SEO work and collaborating cross department Tech savvy individual with existing knowledge of SEO and HTMLExperience with large data analysis across multiple tools and/or data sets ( SQL, Big Query, Tableau….) Manage a suite of SEO tools to monitor and report on channel performance Experience using Google Analytics, Screaming Frog, Ahrefs, Botify and third party rank checking tools Experience with link outreach campaign management and work with PR teams Ability to demonstrable track record of business results through SEOStrong Communication Skills Smart, hard-working, detail-oriented, organized, and motivated individual Our perks It’s important to us that our people are well looked after, which is why we offer everyone BUPA healthcare, life insurance and a pension plan. Because having a break is important for your physical and mental wellbeing, our holiday allowance is 25 days (plus bank holidays) AND your entitlement will increase an extra day for every 2 years you spend with us.
